note: Curated Amazon track (interim until PA-API access). Records here are researched editorially: real ASIN + our own copy + a price BAND (never a scraped live price), no Amazon imagery. import-amazon-watchlist.mjs converts status:ready entries to graph products with merchant 'amazon'. When PA-API lands, the sync job replaces priceBand with live price and adds official images by ASIN — records need no other change.

entries.name: Smiski Living Series Blind Box
entries.blurb: Glow-in-the-dark little weirdos caught mid-chore. Crack the blind box, meet your Smiski, then hunt for the rest of the shelf-dwellers.

entries.name: Smiski Trio Set — Living, Toilet & Bath
entries.blurb: Three sealed blind boxes across three series — the fastest way to build a glowing Smiski colony in your corners overnight.

entries.name: Sonny Angel Animal Series v4 Blind Box
entries.blurb: A tiny cherub in an animal hat, chosen by fate. The internet's favourite desk companion — and yes, there's a secret one.

entries.name: Sonny Angel Hippers Blind Box
entries.blurb: The lying-down cherub that clings to your phone, monitor or plant pot. Small pose, enormous serotonin.

entries.name: Pusheen Squisheen Plush 6"
entries.blurb: The chubby grey tabby of the internet, in squishable bean-plush form. Pocket-sized napping energy for your desk.

entries.name: Pusheen S'mores Squisheen Plush 12"
entries.blurb: Pusheen toasted into a marshmallow-soft s'more. A huggable 12 inches of snack-cat comfort.

entries.name: Hello Kitty × Pusheen Costume Plush
entries.blurb: Two cute-icons in one: Pusheen dressed as Hello Kitty. A crossover plush built to be gifted.

entries.name: Squishmallow Colin the Cow 16"
entries.blurb: Sixteen inches of marshmallow-soft cow. The kind of plush that gets adopted the second it enters a room.

entries.name: Squishmallow Cameron the Cat 16"
entries.blurb: A giant huggable grey cat with a permanently content face. Peak sofa-companion energy.

entries.name: Jellycat Bartholomew Bear (Medium)
entries.blurb: Impossibly soft, quietly smug. The Jellycat bear that starts a whole shelf of them — heirloom-grade cuddle.

entries.name: Miffy XL LED Lamp 20"
entries.blurb: The iconic Dick Bruna bunny as a big, soft glowing lamp. Turns any corner into a calm, cute night-light nook.

entries.name: Miffy Sweet Dreams Night Lamp 12"
entries.blurb: A softly glowing Miffy for the bedside — the favourite bunny as a gentle, dimmable night-light.

entries.name: Kawaii Dancing Cat Desk Accessory Set
entries.blurb: A five-piece pen-holder set of tiny cats mid-boogie. Emotional support stationery for the 9-to-5.

entries.name: Hello Kitty Kawaii Plush 9.5"
entries.blurb: The original icon in soft, squeezable form. A Hello Kitty plush that works as a gift for basically anyone.

entries.name: My Melody Plush 9.5"
entries.blurb: Sanrio's pink-hooded sweetheart in soft plush form. Coquette-core comfort with a permanent gentle smile.

entries.name: GUND Sanrio Kuromi Plush 9.5"
entries.blurb: The self-proclaimed troublemaker in huggable form: nine and a half inches of jester-hatted mischief who is secretly a total softie once you squeeze her.

entries.name: GUND Sanrio Cinnamoroll Plush 6"
entries.blurb: A cloud-white puppy with ears big enough to fly and cheeks pink enough to melt you. Pocket-sized proof that soft things fix hard days.

entries.name: Squishmallows Sanrio Cinnamoroll 14"
entries.blurb: Fourteen inches of marshmallow-soft Cinnamoroll in a cozy argyle sweater, built for face-plant naps and starring roles in your bed's pillow pile.

entries.name: GUND Sanrio Pompompurin Ice Cream Plush 6"
entries.blurb: A golden pudding pup dressed head-to-toe as a sundae, waffle-cone pants and all. Zero calories, maximum cheer, permanently in a good mood.

entries.name: Sanrio My Melody Sakura Plush
entries.blurb: My Melody swaps her classic hood for cherry-blossom season, all petal-pink and impossibly sweet. Springtime you can keep on the shelf year-round.

entries.name: GUND Sanrio Keroppi Plush 6"
entries.blurb: The cheeriest frog on the pond, striped shirt pressed and one hand raised for a permanent hello. Big eyes, bigger optimism.

entries.name: GUND Sanrio Bad Badtz-Maru Plush 6"
entries.blurb: A spiky-haired penguin with a permanent side-eye and zero patience for small talk. The grumpy little icon your desk has been missing.

entries.name: GUND Gudetama The Lazy Egg Plush 17"
entries.blurb: Seventeen inches of the world's most relatable egg, sprawled out and completely done with today. A mood, a mascot, and a very good pillow.

entries.name: Ukonic Sanrio Hello Kitty Glitter Motion Mood Light
entries.blurb: A foot-tall lamp where Hello Kitty floats in a swirl of drifting glitter, casting soft light and softer vibes across your nightstand.

entries.name: Silver Buffalo Sanrio Kuromi Neon LED Lamp
entries.blurb: Kuromi glows up in retro neon, throwing moody pink light for late-night scrolling and main-character energy. Batteries in, attitude on.

entries.name: Hello Kitty and Friends Mystery Blind Box (Series 1)
entries.blurb: Twelve two-inch friends to collect and exactly one surprise per box. Kuromi, Cinnamoroll, Keroppi and the whole gang, sealed until you rip in.

entries.name: Northwest Sanrio Badtz-Maru Cloud Pillow 12"
entries.blurb: Badtz-Maru's deadpan face embroidered on a velvety black cloud, ready to judge your couch quietly and comfortably. Grumpy never looked so plush.

entries.name: Sanrio Hello Kitty Unicorn Figural Mood Light 6"
entries.blurb: Hello Kitty dressed as a pastel unicorn, glowing softly and portable enough to follow you room to room. Pure bedside whimsy on a cord-free budget.

entries.name: POP MART The Monsters Wacky Mart Series Blind Box
entries.blurb: A tiny convenience-store world where The Monsters run the aisles, and each sealed box hides one mischievous mini figure, so you never know which shelf-stocking oddball you'll unbox.

entries.name: POP MART Nyota I Am The Seasons Series Blind Box
entries.blurb: Nyota drifts through spring, summer, autumn and winter in this surprise series, so crack a box and let the seasons decide which dreamy little figure lands on your shelf.

entries.name: POP MART Peach Riot Rush Hour Series Blind Box
entries.blurb: Rebel-girl energy in miniature: the Peach Riot crew comes packed with attitude, and every blind box drops one random rush-hour heroine ready to riot on your desk.

entries.name: POP MART Labubu The Monsters Big Into Energy Plush Pendant Blind Box
entries.blurb: The internet's favorite snaggle-toothed gremlin, shrunk into a tie-dye plush pendant that clips to any bag, with one random Labubu per box and a secret to chase.

entries.name: POP MART Care Bears Colorful Hugs Series (Whole Set)
entries.blurb: The whole rainbow of Colorful Hugs in one set: Pop Mart reimagines the classic cuddly bears as glossy collectible minis made for group hugs across your shelf.

entries.name: Smiski Moving Series Glow-in-the-Dark Blind Box
entries.blurb: Shy little glow-in-the-dark creatures caught mid-stretch and mid-shuffle: tuck one on a shelf and watch it quietly light up your room after dark.

entries.name: Smiski Birthday Series Glow-in-the-Dark Blind Box
entries.blurb: The bashful glow-in-the-dark Smiski throw themselves a party, and each blind box hides one cake-toting, party-hat-wearing figure to celebrate on your desk.

entries.name: Smiski Museum Series Glow-in-the-Dark Blind Box
entries.blurb: Smiski go highbrow, posing as tiny gallery-goers and art pieces: a quietly witty glow-in-the-dark surprise for anyone who loves a little museum-day whimsy.

entries.name: Sonny Angel Snack Series Blind Box
entries.blurb: Diner-food cravings in cherub form: each sealed box hides one Sonny Angel crowned with a burger, fries or milkshake, ready to guard your desk and make you smile.

entries.name: Sonny Angel I Love Rainy Day Series Blind Box
entries.blurb: Cozy grey-sky charm in a box: the I Love Rainy Day Sonny Angels come bundled in raincoats and umbrellas, a soft little pick-me-up for gloomy afternoons.

entries.name: Sonny Angel HIPPERS Looking Back Series Blind Box
entries.blurb: The lounging Hippers Sonny Angels perch on shelf edges glancing back over one shoulder, with one random reclining cherub per box to peer down at you all day.

entries.name: MINISO Disney Zootopia Soft Vinyl Plush Blind Box
entries.blurb: Judy, Nick and the Zootopia crew reborn as soft-vinyl plush surprises: pop a box and meet one random citizen of the animal city, half toy and half display piece.

entries.name: MINISO Care Bears Healing Planet Series Blind Box
entries.blurb: Care Bears go cosmic in glossy soft vinyl, and each mystery box hides one comforting bear from the Healing Planet, a pastel dose of calm for your desk.

entries.name: Care Bears Blind Box Figures 8 Pack Deluxe
entries.blurb: A deluxe box of eight mini Care Bears with two rare hidden bears tucked inside: a nostalgic rainbow of Funshine, Grumpy and friends across 26 collectible styles.

entries.name: SOONHUA Cute Anime Character LED Night Light
entries.blurb: A palm-sized anime buddy that glows soft and warm on your nightstand, rechargeable so there are no cords to hide and no batteries to swap.

entries.name: L LOHAS Squishy Duck LED Night Light
entries.blurb: A squishable silicone duckling that shifts through 16 colors by remote, equal parts desk toy and dimmable bedtime glow.

entries.name: cozifycasa Tomato Bedside Table Lamp
entries.blurb: A plump little tomato that doubles as a lamp, bringing funky retro-kitchen charm to a shelf, desk, or bedside without trying too hard.

entries.name: Onemore Mushroom Fairy String Lights
entries.blurb: Thirty tiny glowing mushrooms on a slim wire, USB or battery, for draping over a headboard and turning a plain wall into cottagecore twinkle.

entries.name: Kawaii Cats Throw Pillow Covers, Set of 2
entries.blurb: A pair of cartoon-cat covers that swap onto your existing pillows in seconds, an easy way to sprinkle some feline cuteness across a sofa or bed.

entries.name: Kawaii Cat Kitten Pillow Covers, 22 inch Set of 2
entries.blurb: Big 22-inch double-sided kitty cushion covers in soft blue, roomy enough to actually lean on while making the whole couch read a little sweeter.

entries.name: Light Pink Fluffy Shag Area Rug, 4x6
entries.blurb: A cloud-soft blush shag underfoot that instantly warms up a bedroom or reading nook, the kind of plush you want bare toes on every morning.

entries.name: Cute Cat Ceramic Mug with Cat-Shaped Lid
entries.blurb: A round-cheeked cat mug topped with a matching kitty lid that keeps your tea warm, a quietly charming upgrade to the morning coffee routine.

entries.name: Yalucky 3D Duck Ceramic Mug with Spoon & Lid
entries.blurb: A cheerful yellow duck sculpted right onto the cup, arriving with a matching spoon and lid to make even instant coffee feel like a treat.

entries.name: GENSTEUO Danish Pastel Wall Art, Set of 9
entries.blurb: Nine printed pastel posters plus sticky dots, a low-commitment way to build a squishy, colorful gallery wall over a bed or desk.

entries.name: HLEYL Meditation Mushroom Resin Figurine
entries.blurb: A tiny mushroom caught mid-yoga-pose, a hand-painted little zen character to perch on a shelf or monitor stand and make you smile mid-scroll.

entries.name: POPRUN Pink Kawaii Spinning Pen & Pencil Organizer Caddy
entries.blurb: A 360-spinning pink carousel that keeps every pen, marker and highlighter within a lazy flick of the wrist. Peak desk-goblin efficiency, zero reaching.

entries.name: Koiswim Kawaii Stationery Gift Set
entries.blurb: Gel pens, a journal, stickers, badges and sticky notes bundled into one impossibly cute care package. The stationery starter pack of somebody's dreams.

entries.name: Kawaii PU Journal & Washi Tape Pen Set
entries.blurb: A soft faux-leather journal that arrives with washi tape and a pen already in tow, so the only excuse left is actually writing something in it.

entries.name: Pink Kawaii Cat Keyboard & Mouse Wrist Rest Set (2 Pc)
entries.blurb: A matching pink cat duo that cushions both keyboard and mouse hand, turning the daily grind into something your wrists actually forgive you for.

entries.name: Cat Paw Pink Gel Mouse Wrist Rest
entries.blurb: A squishy translucent jelly paw that props up your mouse hand all day. Equal parts ergonomic support and desktop serotonin.

entries.name: Pink Cat XXL Kawaii Desk Mat
entries.blurb: A 35-inch pink cat runway for your keyboard, mouse and snack of choice. Instantly makes the whole setup look intentional.

entries.name: Kawaii Cloud XL Gaming Mouse Pad
entries.blurb: Pink, purple and gold clouds stretched across an XL mat, so every scroll feels like floating through a very aesthetic sky.

entries.name: JHTPSLR Rabbit Foldable Kawaii Desk Lamp
entries.blurb: A gradient-glowing bunny with bendy ears that folds flat and recharges over USB. Bedside night-light energy that moonlights as a reading lamp.

entries.name: Cartoon Cat Foldable Kawaii Desk Lamp
entries.blurb: A rechargeable kitty lamp that folds up small and lights up the homework grind. More vibes than lumens, and honestly that's the point.

entries.name: Myratts Squishy Bunny LED Lamp
entries.blurb: A super-squishy silicone bunny that glows, holds your phone and runs on a timer. The desk companion you'll want to poke between emails.

entries.name: Viaky Bunny Silicone Cable Clips (12 Pk)
entries.blurb: Twelve tiny rabbits that grip your stray charging cords and never let a cable slither behind the desk again. Cute cable custody, essentially.

entries.name: COOCAT Pea Pod Cable Clips (3 Pk)
entries.blurb: Little green pea pods that snap onto your desk edge and hold cables hostage in the most wholesome way. Vegetables have never been this useful.

entries.name: Vintage Wooden Cat Tape Dispenser
entries.blurb: A little wooden kitty that guards your tape roll like it's treasure. Retro-cute desk decor that happens to do an actual job.
